hero.description: From powerful analytics to seamless integrations, we provide the toolkit you need to build world-class applications without the hassle.

sync.title: Real-time Synchronisation
sync.description: Changes propagate instantly across all devices. Whether your users are on mobile, desktop, or tablet, they see the same data at the exact same time.
sync.check_1: Offline support out of the box

analytics.title: Actionable Analytics
analytics.description: Don't fly blind. Get deep insights into user behaviour, system performance, and revenue metrics. Visualise your data with beautiful, interactive charts.
analytics.check_1: Export to PDF, CSV, or Excel

more_subtitle: Powerful features designed to help you build faster and scale better.

dark_mode.title: Dark Mode
dark_mode.desc: Built-in support for light and dark themes with automatic system detection.

api_first.title: API First
api_first.desc: REST and GraphQL APIs available for full programmatic control.

sso.title: SSO Login
sso.desc: Enterprise-grade Single Sign-On support for Google, GitHub, and Okta.

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.desc: Track every change made to your project with detailed timestamps.

rbac.title: Role Based Access
rbac.desc: Granular permission controls for admins, editors, and viewers.

uptime.title: 99.99% Uptime
uptime.desc: Guaranteed availability with our globally distributed CDN.

speed.title: Lightning Fast
speed.description: Optimized performance with sub-100ms load times. Built for global scale with edge infrastructure.

design.title: Modern Design
design.description: Clean, responsive UI that looks professional on any device. Fully customizable components.

security.title: High Security
security.description: End-to-end encryption, multi-factor auth, and SOC2 compliance to protect your data.

features.heading: Key Features
features.subheading: Everything you need to build and scale.
